Subject: Request for Email Confirmation for QAQC Audit of Unigaz Office  

Dear [Recipient's Name],  

Regarding the upcoming QAQC Audit of the Unigaz Office, conducted by the BGC and AEB consultants on 31-10-2022, as per the Ashghal instruction, it is mandatory for us to commence the work for this project.  

Please arrange and confirm the email address for communication related to this audit.  

Thank you for your attention.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Organization]
